## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Aembit and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and upcoming initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/FJaxdvmK9SiLa63p_C9esYU8oevKAob5?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Darrell is transitioning out; Kyle will take over with Ehtisham continuing](https://fathom.video/share/FJaxdvmK9SiLa63p_C9esYU8oevKAob5?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
  - [Blog average position improved to 16.74, best performance to date](https://fathom.video/share/FJaxdvmK9SiLa63p_C9esYU8oevKAob5?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [Aembit planning AI identity solution launch; opportunity for pre-launch content](https://fathom.video/share/FJaxdvmK9SiLa63p_C9esYU8oevKAob5?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)
  - [NHICON event planned for late January, AI-focused; content strategy to be developed](https://fathom.video/share/FJaxdvmK9SiLa63p_C9esYU8oevKAob5?tab=summary&timestamp=1417.0)

## Topics

### Team Transition

  - [Ehtisham continuing for continuity](https://fathom.video/share/FJaxdvmK9SiLa63p_C9esYU8oevKAob5?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
